Item 8.01 Other Events.

BTC Updates

On July 6, 2026, Strategy announced the following updates with respect to its bitcoin holdings:

During Period June 29, 2026 to June 30, 2026
BTC SoldAggregate Sale Price (in millions)(2)Average Sale Price(2)
1,363(1)$80.8$59,256
As of June 30, 2026
Aggregate BTC HoldingsAggregate Purchase Price (in billions)(2)Average Purchase Price(2)
846,000$63.94$75,578
During Period July 1, 2026 to July 5, 2026*

2,225(1)$135.2$60,773
As of July 5, 2026*

843,775$63.69$75,476

(1) Represents bitcoin sold to generate funds.

(2) The aggregate sale price and average sale price are net of fees and expenses.
